species: A comparative canine–human therapeutics model is being developed in B-cell lymphoma through the generation of a hybridoma cell that produces a murine monoclonal antibody specific for canine CD20.
cell_type: A comparative canine–human therapeutics model is being developed in B-cell lymphoma through the generation of a hybridoma cell...
disease_state: A comparative canine–human therapeutics model is being developed in B-cell lymphoma...
sample_source: the generation of a hybridoma cell that produces a murine monoclonal antibody...
anatomic_site_tumor: the authentic NCD1.2 IgG purified from the hybridoma cell can bind to canine CD20 expressed on canine lymphoma cells
cell_line: the NCD1.2 monoclonal antibody was purified using Protein A.
